name: ConfirmClearRetainedDialog
description: Confirms clearing retained messages, for a single topic or for everything known-retained below a prefix.

props.name: isOpen
props.description: A boolean store, matching Dialog's open-state contract.

props.name: topic
props.description: The topic being cleared, or the prefix when clearing a branch.

props.name: count
props.description: Number of topics that will be cleared. 0 selects the single-topic wording.

notes: Figma is not linked yet. The branch copy hedges deliberately: under MQTT 3 the retained flag only arrives on subscribe-time replay, so the count cannot claim to be the broker's complete retained set.
